🏆 Regional Inter-Patrol Champions

Congratulations Green Eagle Crew!

Flying high for Plastout Kericho — Green Eagle Crew has won the Regional Scouts Inter-Patrol Competition. "Service Through Environmental Conservation" isn't just a motto, it's how this crew shows up. Well done, Eagles!

The Journey to Victory

1stRegional Position
🦅Green Eagle Crew
♻️Plastout Kericho
Green Eagle Crew, operating under the Plastout Kericho umbrella, represented Kericho with pride at the Regional Scouts Inter-Patrol Competition. From quiz rounds on the six dimensions of Scouting to disaster-preparedness displays and camp-craft, the crew showed excellence at every station.
Their motto "Service Through Environmental Conservation" was lived out on the ground — from river cleanups to community engagement — proving that Scouting is about more than badges, it's about impact.
This win reflects countless hours of camp nights, teamwork, and mentorship. From all of us — congratulations, Green Eagle Crew. Kericho is proud of you! 🌿🦅

🏆 Regionals — On the Ground

Moments captured at the Regional Scouts Inter-Patrol Competition itself.

💚 Beyond the Trophy — Still Rising

Not from regionals — these are the crew living out the mission every day: cleanups, fellowship, and showing up no matter the challenge.
